title: Terracraft
description: A 2D sandbox where you build, explore, and survive in infinite worlds.
details: Dig, build, craft, and survive in this infinite 2D sandbox. Gather resources, fight enemies, build structures, and explore procedurally generated worlds.

title: FortFury
details: Take on tons of different levels and see if you can take out the opponates tower, before they take our yours.

title: Infinit Orbit
description: Navigate through an endless orbital maze with gravity-defying mechanics.
details: A challenging arcade game where you control a ship orbiting through procedurally generated obstacles. Test your reflexes in this minimalist space adventure.

title: GridBreach
description: Hack through hostile grids in this fast-paced tactical challenge.
details: A high-intensity action strategy game where timing and positioning matter. Survive waves, outmaneuver threats, and push deeper into the breach.

title: Virtual Garden
description: Grow and tend your own relaxing digital garden.
details: Plant, nurture, and expand your garden in a calm simulation focused on creativity, progression, and chill vibes.

title: Bomb Blitz
description: A frantic explosive arcade game with quick rounds and big plays.
details: Dodge danger, chain reactions, and outlast the chaos in this fast-paced arcade experience.
